final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original abstract expressionist artwork for modern gallery display.

Style/medium: needs an "abstract expressionist" aesthetic with bold color collision and flowing brushwork — references in the spirit of Willem de Kooning's gestural abstraction, Joan Mitchell's color field energy, 1980s Neo-Expressionist revival; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include non-representational forms full of emotion and energy
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs bold color collision direction — exact hue combinations are yours
Materials/textures: needs flowing brushwork texture — exact paint viscosity and stroke weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must avoid any recognizable figurative imagery
Avoid:
